title: Public Awareness of and Confidence (Trust) in Official Statistics, Northern Ireland 2023
body: "This report presents findings from the Northern Ireland Continuous Household Survey (CHS) on public levels of awareness of NISRA and trust in official statistics produced by NISRA. It also explores changes in attitudes to official statistics over time and provides comparisons with public attitudes to the Office for National Statistics (ONS), where there is appropriate data to do so. "
